TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{ePark, author = {Indigenous Languages Research and Development Foundation}, title = {族語E樂園}, year = {2020}, url = {https://web.klokah.tw/} }

S.FORM: puuk ku haca quw? iqat, iqat i puuk ku haca!
S.PHON: puuk ku ħaʦ~ʨa quw? iqat, iqat i puuk ku ħaʦ~ʨa!
S.FORM: pook ko haca qow? iqat, iqat i pook ko haca!
S.PHON: pook ko ħaʦ~ʨa qow? iqat, iqat i pook ko ħaʦ~ʨa!
S.TRANSL: 那是貓頭鷹嗎？不，那不是貓頭鷹。

S.FORM: sinsi' i hiya' quw? iqat, iqat sinsi' i hiya'.
S.PHON: s~ɕins~ɕiʔ i ħijaʔ quw? iqat, iqat s~ɕins~ɕiʔ i ħijaʔ.
S.FORM: sinsi' i hiya' qow? iqat, iqat sinsi' i hiya'.
S.PHON: s~ɕins~ɕiʔ i ħijaʔ qow? iqat, iqat s~ɕins~ɕiʔ i ħijaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他是老師嗎？不，他不是老師。

S.FORM: sinsi' su' i hiya' quw? iqat, iqat mu sinsi' i hiya'.
S.PHON: s~ɕins~ɕiʔ s~ɕuʔ i ħijaʔ quw? iqat, iqat mu s~ɕins~ɕiʔ i ħijaʔ.
S.FORM: sinsi' so' i hiya' qow? iqat, iqat mo sinsi' i hiya'.
S.PHON: s~ɕins~ɕiʔ s~ɕoʔ i ħijaʔ qow? iqat, iqat mo s~ɕins~ɕiʔ i ħijaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 她是你的老師嗎？不，她不是我的老師。

S.FORM: matanah ku siyatu' niya' quw? qaat, qaat i matanah ku siyatu' niya'.
S.PHON: matanaħ ku s~ɕijatuʔ nijaʔ quw? qaat, qaat i matanaħ ku s~ɕijatuʔ nijaʔ.
S.FORM: matanah ko siyato' niya' qow? qaat, qaat i matanah ko siyato' niya'.
S.PHON: matanaħ ko s~ɕijatoʔ nijaʔ qow? qaat, qaat i matanaħ ko s~ɕijatoʔ nijaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 她的衣服是紅色的嗎？不，她的衣服不是紅色的。

S.FORM: imuleq ku tahunakan haca quw? ini', ini' kaimuleq ku tahunakan haca.
S.PHON: imuleq ku taħunakan ħaʦ~ʨa quw? iniʔ, iniʔ kaimuleq ku taħunakan ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.FORM: imoleq ko tahonakan haca qow? ini', ini' kaimoleq ko tahonakan haca.
S.PHON: imoleq ko taħonakan ħaʦ~ʨa qow? iniʔ, iniʔ kaimoleq ko taħonakan ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.TRANSL: 那張椅子很重嗎？不，那張椅子不重。

S.FORM: babaweq i yaya' su' quw? ini', ini' kababaweq i yaya' muw.
S.PHON: βaβaweq i jajaʔ s~ɕuʔ quw? iniʔ, iniʔ kaβaβaweq i jajaʔ muw.
S.FORM: babaweq i yaya' so' qow? ini', ini' kababaweq i yaya' mow.
S.PHON: βaβaweq i jajaʔ s~ɕoʔ qow? iniʔ, iniʔ kaβaβaweq i jajaʔ mow.
S.TRANSL: 你媽媽很高嗎？不，我媽媽不高。

S.FORM: qanarux ku abag na tunux su' quw? ini', ini kaqanarux ku abag na tunux muw.
S.PHON: qanarux ku aβaɣ na tunux s~ɕuʔ quw? iniʔ, ini kaqanarux ku aβaɣ na tunux muw.
S.FORM: qanarox ko abag na tonox so' qow? ini', ini kaqanarox ko abag na tonox mow.
S.PHON: qanarox ko aβaɣ na tonox s~ɕoʔ qow? iniʔ, ini kaqanarox ko aβaɣ na tonox mow.
S.TRANSL: 你的頭髮很長嗎？不，我的頭髮不長。

S.FORM: makarux ku itaal haca quw? ini', ini' i pakarux hiya'.
S.PHON: makarux ku itaal ħaʦ~ʨa quw? iniʔ, iniʔ i pakarux ħijaʔ.
S.FORM: makarox ko itaal haca qow? ini', ini' i pakarox hiya'.
S.PHON: makarox ko itaal ħaʦ~ʨa qow? iniʔ, iniʔ i pakarox ħijaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 那個人很勤勞嗎？不，他不勤勞。

S.FORM: kiya a suwayi' su' na mamalikuw quw? ukas, ukas a suwayi' mu na mamalikuw.
S.PHON: kija a s~ɕuwajiʔ s~ɕuʔ na mamalikuw quw? ukas~ɕ, ukas~ɕ a s~ɕuwajiʔ mu na mamalikuw.
S.FORM: kiya a sowayi' so' na mamalikow qow? okas, okas a sowayi' mo na mamalikow.
S.PHON: kija a s~ɕowajiʔ s~ɕoʔ na mamalikow qow? okas~ɕ, okas~ɕ a s~ɕowajiʔ mo na mamalikow.
S.TRANSL: 你有弟弟嗎？不，我沒有弟弟。

S.FORM: rahuwal ku imuwag haca quw? ini', ini' karahuwal ku imuwag haca.
S.PHON: raħuwal ku imuwaɣ ħaʦ~ʨa quw? iniʔ, iniʔ karaħuwal ku imuwaɣ ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.FORM: rahowal ko imowag haca qow? ini', ini' karahowal ko imowag haca.
S.PHON: raħowal ko imowaɣ ħaʦ~ʨa qow? iniʔ, iniʔ karaħowal ko imowaɣ ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.TRANSL: 那間房子很大嗎？不，那間房子不大。

S.FORM: makilux sawni' quw? ini', ini' kakilux sawni'.
S.PHON: makilux s~ɕawniʔ quw? iniʔ, iniʔ kakilux s~ɕawniʔ.
S.FORM: makilox sawni' qow? ini', ini' kakilox sawni'.
S.PHON: makilox s~ɕawniʔ qow? iniʔ, iniʔ kakilox s~ɕawniʔ.

S.FORM: mitaal cu tiyens' karariax nha' quw? ini', ini' kitaal cu tiyens' karariax nha'.
S.PHON: mitaal ʦ~ʨu tijens~ɕʔ karariax nħaʔ quw? iniʔ, iniʔ kitaal ʦ~ʨu tijens~ɕʔ karariax nħaʔ.
S.FORM: mitaal co tiyens' karariax nha' qow? ini', ini' kitaal co tiyens' karariax nha'.
S.PHON: mitaal ʦ~ʨo tijens~ɕʔ karariax nħaʔ qow? iniʔ, iniʔ kitaal ʦ~ʨo tijens~ɕʔ karariax nħaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們天天看電視嗎？不，他們沒有天天看電視。

S.FORM: mitaal su' cu ruwas karariax quw? ini', ini' kuwing kitaal karariax cu ruwas.
S.PHON: mitaal s~ɕuʔ ʦ~ʨu ruwas~ɕ karariax quw? iniʔ, iniʔ kuwiŋ kitaal karariax ʦ~ʨu ruwas~ɕ.
S.FORM: mitaal so' co rowas karariax qow? ini', ini' kowing kitaal karariax co rowas.
S.PHON: mitaal s~ɕoʔ ʦ~ʨo rowas~ɕ karariax qow? iniʔ, iniʔ kowiŋ kitaal karariax ʦ~ʨo rowas~ɕ.
S.TRANSL: 你天天讀書嗎？不，我沒有天天讀書。

S.FORM: kiya su' i matas quw? ini', ini' kuwing i patas.
S.PHON: kija s~ɕuʔ i matas~ɕ quw? iniʔ, iniʔ kuwiŋ i patas~ɕ.
S.FORM: kiya so' i matas qow? ini', ini' kowing i patas.
S.PHON: kija s~ɕoʔ i matas~ɕ qow? iniʔ, iniʔ kowiŋ i patas~ɕ.
S.TRANSL: 你在讀書嗎？不，我沒有在讀書。

S.FORM: qumuwalax la! maras su' cu tabakuy quw? ini', ini' kuwing aras cu tabakuy.
S.PHON: qumuwalax la! maras~ɕ s~ɕuʔ ʦ~ʨu taβakuj quw? iniʔ, iniʔ kuwiŋ aras~ɕ ʦ~ʨu taβakuj.
S.FORM: qomowalax la! maras so' co tabakoy qow? ini', ini' kowing aras co tabakoy.
S.PHON: qomowalax la! maras~ɕ s~ɕoʔ ʦ~ʨo taβakoj qow? iniʔ, iniʔ kowiŋ aras~ɕ ʦ~ʨo taβakoj.
S.TRANSL: 下雨了！你帶著雨傘嗎？不，我沒帶著雨傘。

S.FORM: kiya i qumuwalax quw? ini', ini' i quwalax.
S.PHON: kija i qumuwalax quw? iniʔ, iniʔ i quwalax.
S.FORM: kiya i qomowalax qow? ini', ini' i qowalax.
S.PHON: kija i qomowalax qow? iniʔ, iniʔ i qowalax.
S.TRANSL: 在下雨嗎？不，沒有在下雨！

S.FORM: balayq niya' ku ruwas haca quw? ini', ini' niya' kabalayq ku ruwas haca.
S.PHON: βalajq nijaʔ ku ruwas~ɕ ħaʦ~ʨa quw? iniʔ, iniʔ nijaʔ kaβalajq ku ruwas~ɕ ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.FORM: balayq niya' ko rowas haca qow? ini', ini' niya' kabalayq ko rowas haca.
S.PHON: βalajq nijaʔ ko rowas~ɕ ħaʦ~ʨa qow? iniʔ, iniʔ nijaʔ kaβalajq ko rowas~ɕ ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.TRANSL: 她喜歡那本書嗎？不，她不喜歡那本書。

S.FORM: lungulungun su' i yaki' quw? uwal ga, lungulungun mu i yaki'.
S.PHON: luŋuluŋun s~ɕuʔ i jakiʔ quw? uwal ɣa, luŋuluŋun mu i jakiʔ.
S.FORM: longolongon so' i yaki' qow? owal ga, longolongon mo i yaki'.
S.PHON: loŋoloŋon s~ɕoʔ i jakiʔ qow? owal ɣa, loŋoloŋon mo i jakiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 你很想念祖母嗎？是，我很想念祖母。

S.FORM: muwah cimuw kumgabiyan runi karariax quw? ini', ini' camiy uwah kumgabiyan runi karariax.
S.PHON: muwaħ ʦ~ʨimuw kumɣaβijan runi karariax quw? iniʔ, iniʔ ʦ~ʨamij uwaħ kumɣaβijan runi karariax.
S.FORM: mowah cimow komgabiyan roni karariax qow? ini', ini' camiy owah komgabiyan roni karariax.
S.PHON: mowaħ ʦ~ʨimow komɣaβijan roni karariax qow? iniʔ, iniʔ ʦ~ʨamij owaħ komɣaβijan roni karariax.
S.TRANSL: 你們天天來這裡吃晚餐嗎？不，我們沒有天天來這裡吃晚餐。

S.FORM: balayq nku ulaqi' haca ku matas cu ruwas quw? ini', ini' niya' kabalayq ku matas cu ruwas.
S.PHON: βalajq nku ulaqiʔ ħaʦ~ʨa ku matas~ɕ ʦ~ʨu ruwas~ɕ quw? iniʔ, iniʔ nijaʔ kaβalajq ku matas~ɕ ʦ~ʨu ruwas~ɕ.
S.FORM: balayq nko olaqi' haca ko matas co rowas qow? ini', ini' niya' kabalayq ko matas co rowas.
S.PHON: βalajq nko olaqiʔ ħaʦ~ʨa ko matas~ɕ ʦ~ʨo rowas~ɕ qow? iniʔ, iniʔ nijaʔ kaβalajq ko matas~ɕ ʦ~ʨo rowas~ɕ.
S.TRANSL: 那個孩子喜歡畫圖嗎？不，他不喜歡畫圖。

S.FORM: baq maquwas ku ulaqi' haca quw? ini', ini' qabaq maquwas hiya'.
S.PHON: βaq maquwas~ɕ ku ulaqiʔ ħaʦ~ʨa quw? iniʔ, iniʔ qaβaq maquwas~ɕ ħijaʔ.
S.FORM: baq maqowas ko olaqi' haca qow? ini', ini' qabaq maqowas hiya'.
S.PHON: βaq maqowas~ɕ ko olaqiʔ ħaʦ~ʨa qow? iniʔ, iniʔ qaβaq maqowas~ɕ ħijaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 那個孩子會唱歌嗎？不，他不會唱歌。

S.FORM: yani a mausa' mamuw maquwas i papatiqan quw? iqat, iqat camiy mausa' maquwas i papatiqan.
S.PHON: jani a maus~ɕaʔ mamuw maquwas~ɕ i papatiqan quw? iqat, iqat ʦ~ʨamij maus~ɕaʔ maquwas~ɕ i papatiqan.
S.FORM: yani a maosa' mamow maqowas i papatiqan qow? iqat, iqat camiy maosa' maqowas i papatiqan.
S.PHON: jani a maos~ɕaʔ mamow maqowas~ɕ i papatiqan qow? iqat, iqat ʦ~ʨamij maos~ɕaʔ maqowas~ɕ i papatiqan.
S.TRANSL: 你們正要去學校唱歌嗎？不，我們不是要去學校唱歌。

S.FORM: babaw na kinriaxan ga, pakbalaiq musa' kuwing i maganawu' quw? laxi, laxi usa' i maganawu'.
S.PHON: βaβaw na kinriaxan ɣa, pakβalaiq mus~ɕaʔ kuwiŋ i maɣanawuʔ quw? laxi, laxi us~ɕaʔ i maɣanawuʔ.
S.FORM: babaw na kinriaxan ga, pakbalaiq mosa' kowing i maganawo' qow? laxi, laxi osa' i maganawo'.
S.PHON: βaβaw na kinriaxan ɣa, pakβalaiq mos~ɕaʔ kowiŋ i maɣanawoʔ qow? laxi, laxi os~ɕaʔ i maɣanawoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 下午我可以出去玩嗎？(請求同意)不，你不可以出去玩！

S.FORM: paksiunan nha' i tumkura' cu iyuk lku yayawa' la quw? ini', ini' nha' paksiuni i tumkura' cu iyuk ku yayawa'.
S.PHON: paks~ɕiunan nħaʔ i tumkuraʔ ʦ~ʨu ijuk lku jajawaʔ la quw? iniʔ, iniʔ nħaʔ paks~ɕiuni i tumkuraʔ ʦ~ʨu ijuk ku jajawaʔ.
S.FORM: paksionan nha' i tomkora' co iyok lko yayawa' la qow? ini', ini' nha' paksioni i tomkora' co iyok ko yayawa'.
S.PHON: paks~ɕionan nħaʔ i tomkoraʔ ʦ~ʨo ijok lko jajawaʔ la qow? iniʔ, iniʔ nħaʔ paks~ɕioni i tomkoraʔ ʦ~ʨo ijok ko jajawaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們的簍子裝滿了橘子嗎？不，他們的簍子沒有裝滿橘子。

S.FORM: kaa i qilaap. ini' kuwing i qilaap.
S.PHON: kaa i qilaap. iniʔ kuwiŋ i qilaap.
S.FORM: kaa i qilaap. ini' kowing i qilaap.
S.PHON: kaa i qilaap. iniʔ kowiŋ i qilaap.

S.FORM: laxi ungi' cu muwah i kumgabiyan ki!baqun muw!
S.PHON: laxi uŋiʔ ʦ~ʨu muwaħ i kumɣaβijan ki!βaqun muw!
S.FORM: laxi ongi' co mowah i komgabiyan ki!baqon mow!
S.PHON: laxi oŋiʔ ʦ~ʨo mowaħ i komɣaβijan ki!βaqon mow!
S.TRANSL: 別忘記回來吃晚飯喔！我知道了！

S.FORM: atu'na masuwat a quwalax lga, pakbalaiq musa' ci maganawu' i lata' quw? atuna masuwat a quwalax lga, usa' maganawu' i lata'.
S.PHON: atuʔna mas~ɕuwat a quwalax lɣa, pakβalaiq mus~ɕaʔ ʦ~ʨi maɣanawuʔ i lataʔ quw? atuna mas~ɕuwat a quwalax lɣa, us~ɕaʔ maɣanawuʔ i lataʔ.
S.FORM: ato'na masowat a qowalax lga, pakbalaiq mosa' ci maganawo' i lata' qow? atona masowat a qowalax lga, osa' maganawo' i lata'.
S.PHON: atoʔna mas~ɕowat a qowalax lɣa, pakβalaiq mos~ɕaʔ ʦ~ʨi maɣanawoʔ i lataʔ qow? atona mas~ɕowat a qowalax lɣa, os~ɕaʔ maɣanawoʔ i lataʔ.
S.TRANSL: 如果雨停了，我可以出去玩嗎？如果雨停了，你可以出去玩。

S.FORM: maqabubing i yaya' ka aruwa i matigi lata' quw? uwal ga, aruwa i maqabubing yaya i matigi lata'.
S.PHON: maqaβuβiŋ i jajaʔ ka aruwa i matiɣi lataʔ quw? uwal ɣa, aruwa i maqaβuβiŋ jaja i matiɣi lataʔ.
S.FORM: maqabobing i yaya' ka arowa i matigi lata' qow? owal ga, arowa i maqabobing yaya i matigi lata'.
S.PHON: maqaβoβiŋ i jajaʔ ka arowa i matiɣi lataʔ qow? owal ɣa, arowa i maqaβoβiŋ jaja i matiɣi lataʔ.
S.TRANSL: 媽媽出去的時候，她戴著帽子嗎？是/對，媽媽出去的時候，她戴著帽子。

S.FORM: maras cu tabakuy i yaba' ka aruwa i matigi lata' quw? ini', ini' aras cu tabakuy i yaba' ka aruwa i matigi lata'.
S.PHON: maras~ɕ ʦ~ʨu taβakuj i jaβaʔ ka aruwa i matiɣi lataʔ quw? iniʔ, iniʔ aras~ɕ ʦ~ʨu taβakuj i jaβaʔ ka aruwa i matiɣi lataʔ.
S.FORM: maras co tabakoy i yaba' ka arowa i matigi lata' qow? ini', ini' aras co tabakoy i yaba' ka arowa i matigi lata'.
S.PHON: maras~ɕ ʦ~ʨo taβakoj i jaβaʔ ka arowa i matiɣi lataʔ qow? iniʔ, iniʔ aras~ɕ ʦ~ʨo taβakoj i jaβaʔ ka arowa i matiɣi lataʔ.
S.TRANSL: 爸爸出去的時候，他帶著雨傘嗎？不，爸爸出去的時候，他沒有帶著雨傘。

S.FORM: baqun mamu cu mauwah casan i yaki' quw? uwal ga, baqun niyam cu mauwah casan i yaki'.
S.PHON: βaqun mamu ʦ~ʨu mauwaħ ʦ~ʨas~ɕan i jakiʔ quw? uwal ɣa, βaqun nijam ʦ~ʨu mauwaħ ʦ~ʨas~ɕan i jakiʔ.
S.FORM: baqon mamo co maowah casan i yaki' qow? owal ga, baqon niyam co maowah casan i yaki'.
S.PHON: βaqon mamo ʦ~ʨo maowaħ ʦ~ʨas~ɕan i jakiʔ qow? owal ɣa, βaqon nijam ʦ~ʨo maowaħ ʦ~ʨas~ɕan i jakiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 你們知道祖母明天要來嗎？是，我們知道祖母明天要來。

S.FORM: baqun mamu cu mauwah casan i yata' quw? ini', ini' niyam baqi cu mauwah casan i yata'.
S.PHON: βaqun mamu ʦ~ʨu mauwaħ ʦ~ʨas~ɕan i jataʔ quw? iniʔ, iniʔ nijam βaqi ʦ~ʨu mauwaħ ʦ~ʨas~ɕan i jataʔ.
S.FORM: baqon mamo co maowah casan i yata' qow? ini', ini' niyam baqi co maowah casan i yata'.
S.PHON: βaqon mamo ʦ~ʨo maowaħ ʦ~ʨas~ɕan i jataʔ qow? iniʔ, iniʔ nijam βaqi ʦ~ʨo maowaħ ʦ~ʨas~ɕan i jataʔ.
S.TRANSL: 你們知道嬸嬸明天要來嗎？不，我們不知道嬸嬸明天要來。

S.FORM: gabagan ka hani. payux a bayhu ka mamati' i gabagan.
S.PHON: ɣaβaɣan ka ħani. pajux a βajħu ka mamatiʔ i ɣaβaɣan.
S.FORM: gabagan ka hani. payox a bayho ka mamati' i gabagan.
S.PHON: ɣaβaɣan ka ħani. pajox a βajħo ka mamatiʔ i ɣaβaɣan.
S.TRANSL: 現在是夏天。夏天時，颱風很多。

S.FORM: yayaik uwiy ku qusiya' na gawng i gabagan. lihpeq ku qusiya' na gawng i qamisan.
S.PHON: jajaik uwij ku qus~ɕijaʔ na ɣawŋ i ɣaβaɣan. liħpeq ku qus~ɕijaʔ na ɣawŋ i qamis~ɕan.
S.FORM: yayaik owiy ko qosiya' na gawng i gabagan. lihpeq ko qosiya' na gawng i qamisan.
S.PHON: jajaik owij ko qos~ɕijaʔ na ɣawŋ i ɣaβaɣan. liħpeq ko qos~ɕijaʔ na ɣawŋ i qamis~ɕan.
S.TRANSL: 夏天時，溪水也很深(多/大)。冬天時，溪水很淺(小)。

S.FORM: macay ku iyuk la i tikay ka qamisan. balaiq mu i niqun ku iyuk.
S.PHON: maʦ~ʨaj ku ijuk la i tikaj ka qamis~ɕan. βalaiq mu i niqun ku ijuk.
S.FORM: macay ko iyok la i tikay ka qamisan. balaiq mo i niqon ko iyok.
S.PHON: maʦ~ʨaj ko ijok la i tikaj ka qamis~ɕan. βalaiq mo i niqon ko ijok.
S.TRANSL: 秋天時，橘子成熟了。我喜歡吃橘子。
沒有[表過去沒有作某事]
不要[表未來不要作某事]

S.FORM: kiya inu' ku papatas muw? kiya runiy ku papatas su'.
S.PHON: kija inuʔ ku papatas~ɕ muw? kija runij ku papatas~ɕ s~ɕuʔ.
S.FORM: kiya ino' ko papatas mow? kiya roniy ko papatas so'.
S.PHON: kija inoʔ ko papatas~ɕ mow? kija ronij ko papatas~ɕ s~ɕoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 我的筆在哪裡？你的筆在這裡。

S.FORM: kiya inu' ku ruwas muw? kiya runiy ku ruwas su'.
S.PHON: kija inuʔ ku ruwas~ɕ muw? kija runij ku ruwas~ɕ s~ɕuʔ.
S.FORM: kiya ino' ko rowas mow? kiya roniy ko rowas so'.
S.PHON: kija inoʔ ko rowas~ɕ mow? kija ronij ko rowas~ɕ s~ɕoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 我的書在哪裡？你的書在這裡。

S.FORM: kiya inu' ku qabubing niya'? kiya i haca ku qabubing niya'.
S.PHON: kija inuʔ ku qaβuβiŋ nijaʔ? kija i ħaʦ~ʨa ku qaβuβiŋ nijaʔ.
S.FORM: kiya ino' ko qabobing niya'? kiya i haca ko qabobing niya'.
S.PHON: kija inoʔ ko qaβoβiŋ nijaʔ? kija i ħaʦ~ʨa ko qaβoβiŋ nijaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他的帽子在哪裡？他的帽子在那裡。

S.FORM: kiya inu' ku yayawa' niya'? kiya i haca ku yayawa' niya'.
S.PHON: kija inuʔ ku jajawaʔ nijaʔ? kija i ħaʦ~ʨa ku jajawaʔ nijaʔ.
S.FORM: kiya ino' ko yayawa' niya'? kiya i haca ko yayawa' niya'.
S.PHON: kija inoʔ ko jajawaʔ nijaʔ? kija i ħaʦ~ʨa ko jajawaʔ nijaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他/她的揹簍在哪裡？他/她的揹簍在那裡。

S.FORM: kiya inu' ku imuwag mamuw? kiya i ragiyax ku imuwag niyam.
S.PHON: kija inuʔ ku imuwaɣ mamuw? kija i raɣijax ku imuwaɣ nijam.
S.FORM: kiya ino' ko imowag mamow? kiya i ragiyax ko imowag niyam.
S.PHON: kija inoʔ ko imowaɣ mamow? kija i raɣijax ko imowaɣ nijam.
S.TRANSL: 你們家在哪裡？我們家在山上。

S.FORM: kiya inu' i yaba' su'? kiya papatiqan i yaba' muw.
S.PHON: kija inuʔ i jaβaʔ s~ɕuʔ? kija papatiqan i jaβaʔ muw.
S.FORM: kiya ino' i yaba' so'? kiya papatiqan i yaba' mow.
S.PHON: kija inoʔ i jaβaʔ s~ɕoʔ? kija papatiqan i jaβaʔ mow.
S.TRANSL: 你爸爸在哪裡？我爸爸在學校裡。

S.FORM: kiya inu' i yaya' su'? kiya imuwag i yaya' muw.
S.PHON: kija inuʔ i jajaʔ s~ɕuʔ? kija imuwaɣ i jajaʔ muw.
S.FORM: kiya ino' i yaya' so'? kiya imowag i yaya' mow.
S.PHON: kija inoʔ i jajaʔ s~ɕoʔ? kija imowaɣ i jajaʔ mow.
S.TRANSL: 你媽媽在哪裡？我媽媽在家裡。

S.FORM: mausa' su' inu' i casan? mausa' kuwing ragiyax i casan.
S.PHON: maus~ɕaʔ s~ɕuʔ inuʔ i ʦ~ʨas~ɕan? maus~ɕaʔ kuwiŋ raɣijax i ʦ~ʨas~ɕan.
S.FORM: maosa' so' ino' i casan? maosa' kowing ragiyax i casan.
S.PHON: maos~ɕaʔ s~ɕoʔ inoʔ i ʦ~ʨas~ɕan? maos~ɕaʔ kowiŋ raɣijax i ʦ~ʨas~ɕan.
S.TRANSL: 你明天要去哪裡？我明天要去山上。

S.FORM: mausa' su' inu' i casan? mausa' kuwing papatiqan i casan.
S.PHON: maus~ɕaʔ s~ɕuʔ inuʔ i ʦ~ʨas~ɕan? maus~ɕaʔ kuwiŋ papatiqan i ʦ~ʨas~ɕan.
S.FORM: maosa' so' ino' i casan? maosa' kowing papatiqan i casan.
S.PHON: maos~ɕaʔ s~ɕoʔ inoʔ i ʦ~ʨas~ɕan? maos~ɕaʔ kowiŋ papatiqan i ʦ~ʨas~ɕan.
S.TRANSL: 你明天要去哪裡？我明天要去學校。

S.FORM: mausa' su' inu' i casan? mausa' kuwing imuwag ni yaki' i casan.
S.PHON: maus~ɕaʔ s~ɕuʔ inuʔ i ʦ~ʨas~ɕan? maus~ɕaʔ kuwiŋ imuwaɣ ni jakiʔ i ʦ~ʨas~ɕan.
S.FORM: maosa' so' ino' i casan? maosa' kowing imowag ni yaki' i casan.
S.PHON: maos~ɕaʔ s~ɕoʔ inoʔ i ʦ~ʨas~ɕan? maos~ɕaʔ kowiŋ imowaɣ ni jakiʔ i ʦ~ʨas~ɕan.
S.TRANSL: 你明天要去哪裡？我明天要去祖母家。

S.FORM: minusa' cimuw inu' cu hisa'? minusa' camiy i ragiyax cu hisa'.
S.PHON: minus~ɕaʔ ʦ~ʨimuw inuʔ ʦ~ʨu ħis~ɕaʔ? minus~ɕaʔ ʦ~ʨamij i raɣijax ʦ~ʨu ħis~ɕaʔ.
S.FORM: minosa' cimow ino' co hisa'? minosa' camiy i ragiyax co hisa'.
S.PHON: minos~ɕaʔ ʦ~ʨimow inoʔ ʦ~ʨo ħis~ɕaʔ? minos~ɕaʔ ʦ~ʨamij i raɣijax ʦ~ʨo ħis~ɕaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 你們昨天去哪裡？我們昨天去山上。

S.FORM: minusa' inu' cu hisa' i nha'? minusa' mitaal yutas cu hisa' i nha'.
S.PHON: minus~ɕaʔ inuʔ ʦ~ʨu ħis~ɕaʔ i nħaʔ? minus~ɕaʔ mitaal jutas~ɕ ʦ~ʨu ħis~ɕaʔ i nħaʔ.
S.FORM: minosa' ino' co hisa' i nha'? minosa' mitaal yotas co hisa' i nha'.
S.PHON: minos~ɕaʔ inoʔ ʦ~ʨo ħis~ɕaʔ i nħaʔ? minos~ɕaʔ mitaal jotas~ɕ ʦ~ʨo ħis~ɕaʔ i nħaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們昨天去哪裡？他們昨天去拜訪祖父。

S.FORM: minusa' inu' cu hisa' i nha'? minusa' i papatiqan cu hisa' i nha'.
S.PHON: minus~ɕaʔ inuʔ ʦ~ʨu ħis~ɕaʔ i nħaʔ? minus~ɕaʔ i papatiqan ʦ~ʨu ħis~ɕaʔ i nħaʔ.
S.FORM: minosa' ino' co hisa' i nha'? minosa' i papatiqan co hisa' i nha'.
S.PHON: minos~ɕaʔ inoʔ ʦ~ʨo ħis~ɕaʔ i nħaʔ? minos~ɕaʔ i papatiqan ʦ~ʨo ħis~ɕaʔ i nħaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們昨天去哪裡？他們昨天去學校。

S.FORM: mausa' su' inu'? yani na' a mausa' mu i imuwag.
S.PHON: maus~ɕaʔ s~ɕuʔ inuʔ? jani naʔ a maus~ɕaʔ mu i imuwaɣ.
S.FORM: maosa' so' ino'? yani na' a maosa' mo i imowag.
S.PHON: maos~ɕaʔ s~ɕoʔ inoʔ? jani naʔ a maos~ɕaʔ mo i imowaɣ.
S.TRANSL: 你現在要去哪裡？我正要回家。

S.FORM: minukahul su' inu' cu sawni'? minukahul kuwing i imuwag cu sawni'.
S.PHON: minukaħul s~ɕuʔ inuʔ ʦ~ʨu s~ɕawniʔ? minukaħul kuwiŋ i imuwaɣ ʦ~ʨu s~ɕawniʔ.
S.FORM: minokahol so' ino' co sawni'? minokahol kowing i imowag co sawni'.
S.PHON: minokaħol s~ɕoʔ inoʔ ʦ~ʨo s~ɕawniʔ? minokaħol kowiŋ i imowaɣ ʦ~ʨo s~ɕawniʔ.
S.TRANSL: 你今天從哪裡來的？我今天從家裡來的。

S.FORM: minukahul su' inu' cu sawni'? minukahul kuwing i ragiyax cu sawni'.
S.PHON: minukaħul s~ɕuʔ inuʔ ʦ~ʨu s~ɕawniʔ? minukaħul kuwiŋ i raɣijax ʦ~ʨu s~ɕawniʔ.
S.FORM: minokahol so' ino' co sawni'? minokahol kowing i ragiyax co sawni'.
S.PHON: minokaħol s~ɕoʔ inoʔ ʦ~ʨo s~ɕawniʔ? minokaħol kowiŋ i raɣijax ʦ~ʨo s~ɕawniʔ.
S.TRANSL: 你今天從哪裡來的？我今天從山上來的。

S.FORM: matas su' na' quw? uwal ga, matas kuwing na'.
S.PHON: matas~ɕ s~ɕuʔ naʔ quw? uwal ɣa, matas~ɕ kuwiŋ naʔ.
S.FORM: matas so' na' qow? owal ga, matas kowing na'.
S.PHON: matas~ɕ s~ɕoʔ naʔ qow? owal ɣa, matas~ɕ kowiŋ naʔ.
S.TRANSL: 你是學生嗎？是，我是學生。

S.FORM: hiya' ku papsibaq quw? iqaat, sinsang i hiya'.
S.PHON: ħijaʔ ku paps~ɕiβaq quw? iqaat, s~ɕins~ɕaŋ i ħijaʔ.
S.FORM: hiya' ko papsibaq qow? iqaat, sinsang i hiya'.
S.PHON: ħijaʔ ko paps~ɕiβaq qow? iqaat, s~ɕins~ɕaŋ i ħijaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他是老師嗎？不是，他是醫生。

S.FORM: hiya' ku sinsi' su' quw? uwal ga, hiya' ku sinsi' muw.
S.PHON: ħijaʔ ku s~ɕins~ɕiʔ s~ɕuʔ quw? uwal ɣa, ħijaʔ ku s~ɕins~ɕiʔ muw.
S.FORM: hiya' ko sinsi' so' qow? owal ga, hiya' ko sinsi' mow.
S.PHON: ħijaʔ ko s~ɕins~ɕiʔ s~ɕoʔ qow? owal ɣa, ħijaʔ ko s~ɕins~ɕiʔ mow.
S.TRANSL: 他是你的老師嗎？是/對，他是我的老師。

S.FORM: hiya' ku mama' su' quw? iqat, hiya' ga sinsi' muw.
S.PHON: ħijaʔ ku mamaʔ s~ɕuʔ quw? iqat, ħijaʔ ɣa s~ɕins~ɕiʔ muw.
S.FORM: hiya' ko mama' so' qow? iqat, hiya' ga sinsi' mow.
S.PHON: ħijaʔ ko mamaʔ s~ɕoʔ qow? iqat, ħijaʔ ɣa s~ɕins~ɕiʔ mow.
S.TRANSL: 他是你的叔叔嗎？不是，他是我的老師。

S.FORM: caxa' ku suwayi' su' na kanayril quw? iqaat, rarusa' ku suwayi' mu na kanayril
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨaxaʔ ku s~ɕuwajiʔ s~ɕuʔ na kanajril quw? iqaat, rarus~ɕaʔ ku s~ɕuwajiʔ mu na kanajril
S.FORM: caxa' ko sowayi' so' na kanayril qow? iqaat, rarosa' ko sowayi' mo na kanayril
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨaxaʔ ko s~ɕowajiʔ s~ɕoʔ na kanajril qow? iqaat, raros~ɕaʔ ko s~ɕowajiʔ mo na kanajril
S.TRANSL: 你有一個妹妹嗎？不，我有二個妹妹。

S.FORM: rarusa' ku suwayi' su' na mamalikuw quw? iqaat, caxa' ku qumisuwan ru, caxa' ku suwayi' mu na mamalikuw.
S.PHON: rarus~ɕaʔ ku s~ɕuwajiʔ s~ɕuʔ na mamalikuw quw? iqaat, ʦ~ʨaxaʔ ku qumis~ɕuwan ru, ʦ~ʨaxaʔ ku s~ɕuwajiʔ mu na mamalikuw.
S.FORM: rarosa' ko sowayi' so' na mamalikow qow? iqaat, caxa' ko qomisowan ro, caxa' ko sowayi' mo na mamalikow.
S.PHON: raros~ɕaʔ ko s~ɕowajiʔ s~ɕoʔ na mamalikow qow? iqaat, ʦ~ʨaxaʔ ko qomis~ɕowan ro, ʦ~ʨaxaʔ ko s~ɕowajiʔ mo na mamalikow.
S.TRANSL: 你有兩個弟弟嗎？不，我有一個哥哥一個弟弟。

S.FORM: rarusa' ku qumisuwan su na kanayril quw? iqaat, caxa' ku qumisuwan na kanayril ru, caxa' ku qumisuwan mu na mamalikuw.
S.PHON: rarus~ɕaʔ ku qumis~ɕuwan s~ɕu na kanajril quw? iqaat, ʦ~ʨaxaʔ ku qumis~ɕuwan na kanajril ru, ʦ~ʨaxaʔ ku qumis~ɕuwan mu na mamalikuw.
S.FORM: rarosa' ko qomisowan so na kanayril qow? iqaat, caxa' ko qomisowan na kanayril ro, caxa' ko qomisowan mo na mamalikow.
S.PHON: raros~ɕaʔ ko qomis~ɕowan s~ɕo na kanajril qow? iqaat, ʦ~ʨaxaʔ ko qomis~ɕowan na kanajril ro, ʦ~ʨaxaʔ ko qomis~ɕowan mo na mamalikow.
S.TRANSL: 你有兩個姊姊嗎？不，我有一個姊姊一個哥哥。

S.FORM: pila' mu ku haniy quw? uwal ga, pila' su' ku haniy.
S.PHON: pilaʔ mu ku ħanij quw? uwal ɣa, pilaʔ s~ɕuʔ ku ħanij.
S.FORM: pila' mo ko haniy qow? owal ga, pila' so' ko haniy.
S.PHON: pilaʔ mo ko ħanij qow? owal ɣa, pilaʔ s~ɕoʔ ko ħanij.
S.TRANSL: 這是我的錢嗎？是的，這是你的錢。

S.FORM: pahpah su' ku haca quw? iqaat, iqaat mu i pahpah ku haca.
S.PHON: paħpaħ s~ɕuʔ ku ħaʦ~ʨa quw? iqaat, iqaat mu i paħpaħ ku ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.FORM: pahpah so' ko haca qow? iqaat, iqaat mo i pahpah ko haca.
S.PHON: paħpaħ s~ɕoʔ ko ħaʦ~ʨa qow? iqaat, iqaat mo i paħpaħ ko ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.TRANSL: 那些是你的花嗎？不是，那些不是我的花。

S.FORM: humicuwa' su' la? muxaal a tunux muw.
S.PHON: ħumiʦ~ʨuwaʔ s~ɕuʔ la? muxaal a tunux muw.
S.FORM: homicowa' so' la? moxaal a tonox mow.
S.PHON: ħomiʦ~ʨowaʔ s~ɕoʔ la? moxaal a tonox mow.

S.FORM: humicuwa' su' la? muxaal cubalay ku rawweq muw.
S.PHON: ħumiʦ~ʨuwaʔ s~ɕuʔ la? muxaal ʦ~ʨuβalaj ku rawweq muw.
S.FORM: homicowa' so' la? moxaal cobalay ko rawweq mow.
S.PHON: ħomiʦ~ʨowaʔ s~ɕoʔ la? moxaal ʦ~ʨoβalaj ko rawweq mow.
S.TRANSL: 你怎麼了？我的眼睛很痛。

S.FORM: imuleq ku raralan haniy quw? uwal ga, imuleq ku raralan haniy.
S.PHON: imuleq ku raralan ħanij quw? uwal ɣa, imuleq ku raralan ħanij.
S.FORM: imoleq ko raralan haniy qow? owal ga, imoleq ko raralan haniy.
S.PHON: imoleq ko raralan ħanij qow? owal ɣa, imoleq ko raralan ħanij.
S.TRANSL: 這張桌子很重嗎？是/對，這張桌子很重。

S.FORM: imuleq ku tahunakan haca quw? ini', lihika' ku tahunakan haca.
S.PHON: imuleq ku taħunakan ħaʦ~ʨa quw? iniʔ, liħikaʔ ku taħunakan ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.FORM: imoleq ko tahonakan haca qow? ini', lihika' ko tahonakan haca.
S.PHON: imoleq ko taħonakan ħaʦ~ʨa qow? iniʔ, liħikaʔ ko taħonakan ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.TRANSL: 那張椅子很重嗎？不，那張椅子很輕。

S.FORM: magalawa' ku ngiyaw su' quw? uwal ga, magalawa' ku ngiyaw muw.
S.PHON: maɣalawaʔ ku ŋijaw s~ɕuʔ quw? uwal ɣa, maɣalawaʔ ku ŋijaw muw.
S.FORM: magalawa' ko ngiyaw so' qow? owal ga, magalawa' ko ngiyaw mow.
S.PHON: maɣalawaʔ ko ŋijaw s~ɕoʔ qow? owal ɣa, maɣalawaʔ ko ŋijaw mow.
S.TRANSL: 你的貓是黑色的嗎？是/對，我的貓是黑色的。

S.FORM: mitaal cu tiyens' karariax i nha' quw? uwal ga, mitaal cu tiyens' karariax i nha'.
S.PHON: mitaal ʦ~ʨu tijens~ɕʔ karariax i nħaʔ quw? uwal ɣa, mitaal ʦ~ʨu tijens~ɕʔ karariax i nħaʔ.
S.FORM: mitaal co tiyens' karariax i nha' qow? owal ga, mitaal co tiyens' karariax i nha'.
S.PHON: mitaal ʦ~ʨo tijens~ɕʔ karariax i nħaʔ qow? owal ɣa, mitaal ʦ~ʨo tijens~ɕʔ karariax i nħaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們天天看電視嗎？是/對，他們天天看電視。

S.FORM: balaiq a kaal sawni' quw? uwal ga, balaiq a kaal sawni'.
S.PHON: βalaiq a kaal s~ɕawniʔ quw? uwal ɣa, βalaiq a kaal s~ɕawniʔ.
S.FORM: balaiq a kaal sawni' qow? owal ga, balaiq a kaal sawni'.
S.PHON: βalaiq a kaal s~ɕawniʔ qow? owal ɣa, βalaiq a kaal s~ɕawniʔ.
S.TRANSL: 今天天氣好嗎？是/對，今天天氣很好。

S.FORM: ima' ralu' su'? Bawnay na Kagi' ku ralu' muw.
S.PHON: imaʔ raluʔ s~ɕuʔ? βawnaj na kaɣiʔ ku raluʔ muw.
S.FORM: ima' ralo' so'? Bawnay na Kagi' ko ralo' mow.
S.PHON: imaʔ raloʔ s~ɕoʔ? βawnaj na kaɣiʔ ko raloʔ mow.
S.TRANSL: 你叫什麼名字？我叫Bawnay。(我的名字是Bawnay。)

S.FORM: ima' ralu' ni yaba' su'? Kaynu' na Kagaw ku ralu' ni yaba' muw.
S.PHON: imaʔ raluʔ ni jaβaʔ s~ɕuʔ? kajnuʔ na kaɣaw ku raluʔ ni jaβaʔ muw.
S.FORM: ima' ralo' ni yaba' so'? Kayno' na Kagaw ko ralo' ni yaba' mow.
S.PHON: imaʔ raloʔ ni jaβaʔ s~ɕoʔ? kajnoʔ na kaɣaw ko raloʔ ni jaβaʔ mow.
S.TRANSL: 你爸爸叫什麼名字？我爸爸叫Kagaw(全名)。

S.FORM: ima' ku suquleq haca? Puoh na Tuyaw i hiya'.
S.PHON: imaʔ ku s~ɕuquleq ħaʦ~ʨa? puoħ na tujaw i ħijaʔ.
S.FORM: ima' ko soqoleq haca? Pooh na Toyaw i hiya'.
S.PHON: imaʔ ko s~ɕoqoleq ħaʦ~ʨa? pooħ na tojaw i ħijaʔ.

S.FORM: ima' ku mamalikuw haca? Yumin na Puna'.
S.PHON: imaʔ ku mamalikuw ħaʦ~ʨa? jumin na punaʔ.
S.FORM: ima' ko mamalikow haca? Yomin na Pona'.
S.PHON: imaʔ ko mamalikow ħaʦ~ʨa? jomin na ponaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 那個男人是誰？他是Yumin(全名)。
誰呀？(有人在敲門時問)我們是Yawi 和Watan。

S.FORM: ima' ku mamalikuw haca? hiya' ga sinsi' muw.
S.PHON: imaʔ ku mamalikuw ħaʦ~ʨa? ħijaʔ ɣa s~ɕins~ɕiʔ muw.
S.FORM: ima' ko mamalikow haca? hiya' ga sinsi' mow.
S.PHON: imaʔ ko mamalikow ħaʦ~ʨa? ħijaʔ ɣa s~ɕins~ɕiʔ mow.
S.TRANSL: 那個男人是誰？他是我的老師。

S.FORM: ima' ku kanayril haca? hiya' ga qumisuwan mu na kanayril.
S.PHON: imaʔ ku kanajril ħaʦ~ʨa? ħijaʔ ɣa qumis~ɕuwan mu na kanajril.
S.FORM: ima' ko kanayril haca? hiya' ga qomisowan mo na kanayril.
S.PHON: imaʔ ko kanajril ħaʦ~ʨa? ħijaʔ ɣa qomis~ɕowan mo na kanajril.
S.TRANSL: 那個女人是誰？她是我的姊姊。

S.FORM: ima' kahabag ku ululaqi' haca? rawin mu kahabag.
S.PHON: imaʔ kaħaβaɣ ku ululaqiʔ ħaʦ~ʨa? rawin mu kaħaβaɣ.
S.FORM: ima' kahabag ko ololaqi' haca? rawin mo kahabag.
S.PHON: imaʔ kaħaβaɣ ko ololaqiʔ ħaʦ~ʨa? rawin mo kaħaβaɣ.
S.TRANSL: 那些小孩是誰？他們是我的朋友。

S.FORM: papiya' cimuw ka qutux cu imuwag? yayma' camiy ka qutux cu imuwag.
S.PHON: papijaʔ ʦ~ʨimuw ka qutux ʦ~ʨu imuwaɣ? jajmaʔ ʦ~ʨamij ka qutux ʦ~ʨu imuwaɣ.
S.FORM: papiya' cimow ka qotox co imowag? yayma' camiy ka qotox co imowag.

S.FORM: papiya' cimuw ka matasuwayi'? caxa' ku qumisuwan ru' caxa' ku suwayi' mu na kanayril.

S.PHON: βalajq talan ku ħakriʔ na utux!
S.FORM: balayq talan ko hakri' na otox!
S.PHON: βalajq talan ko ħakriʔ na otox!

S.FORM: uniyal ku bayhu ka mamati' la!
S.PHON: unijal ku βajħu ka mamatiʔ la!
S.FORM: oniyal ko bayho ka mamati' la!
S.PHON: onijal ko βajħo ka mamatiʔ la!

S.FORM: haniyan su' i matas quw? uwal ga, haniyan kuwing i matas.
S.PHON: ħanijan s~ɕuʔ i matas~ɕ quw? uwal ɣa, ħanijan kuwiŋ i matas~ɕ.
S.FORM: haniyan so' i matas qow? owal ga, haniyan kowing i matas.
S.PHON: ħanijan s~ɕoʔ i matas~ɕ qow? owal ɣa, ħanijan kowiŋ i matas~ɕ.
S.TRANSL: 你在讀書嗎？是的，我在讀書。

S.FORM: haniyan su' i matas quw? iqaat, haniyan kuwing i matas cu ruwas.
S.PHON: ħanijan s~ɕuʔ i matas~ɕ quw? iqaat, ħanijan kuwiŋ i matas~ɕ ʦ~ʨu ruwas~ɕ.
S.FORM: haniyan so' i matas qow? iqaat, haniyan kowing i matas co rowas.
S.PHON: ħanijan s~ɕoʔ i matas~ɕ qow? iqaat, ħanijan kowiŋ i matas~ɕ ʦ~ʨo rowas~ɕ.
S.TRANSL: 你在讀書嗎？不，我在畫畫。

S.FORM: kiya maqilaap i suwayi' su' na kanairil quw? uwal ga, kiya i maqilaap hiya'.
S.PHON: kija maqilaap i s~ɕuwajiʔ s~ɕuʔ na kanairil quw? uwal ɣa, kija i maqilaap ħijaʔ.
S.FORM: kiya maqilaap i sowayi' so' na kanairil qow? owal ga, kiya i maqilaap hiya'.
S.PHON: kija maqilaap i s~ɕowajiʔ s~ɕoʔ na kanairil qow? owal ɣa, kija i maqilaap ħijaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 你妹妹在睡覺嗎？是的，她在睡覺。

S.FORM: kiya maqilaap i suwayi' su' na kanairil quw? iqaat, kiya i yugi' hiya'.
S.PHON: kija maqilaap i s~ɕuwajiʔ s~ɕuʔ na kanairil quw? iqaat, kija i juɣiʔ ħijaʔ.
S.FORM: kiya maqilaap i sowayi' so' na kanairil qow? iqaat, kiya i yogi' hiya'.
S.PHON: kija maqilaap i s~ɕowajiʔ s~ɕoʔ na kanairil qow? iqaat, kija i joɣiʔ ħijaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 你妹妹在睡覺嗎？不是，她在跳舞。

S.FORM: kiya i maganawu' ku ululaqi' haca quw? uwal ga, kiya i maganawu' ku ululqi' haca.
S.PHON: kija i maɣanawuʔ ku ululaqiʔ ħaʦ~ʨa quw? uwal ɣa, kija i maɣanawuʔ ku ululqiʔ ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.FORM: kiya i maganawo' ko ololaqi' haca qow? owal ga, kiya i maganawo' ko ololqi' haca.
S.PHON: kija i maɣanawoʔ ko ololaqiʔ ħaʦ~ʨa qow? owal ɣa, kija i maɣanawoʔ ko ololqiʔ ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.TRANSL: 那些孩子在玩耍嗎？是/對，那些孩子在玩耍。

S.FORM: kiya i maquwas nha' quw? iqaat, kiya i matas nha'.
S.PHON: kija i maquwas~ɕ nħaʔ quw? iqaat, kija i matas~ɕ nħaʔ.
S.FORM: kiya i maqowas nha' qow? iqaat, kiya i matas nha'.
S.PHON: kija i maqowas~ɕ nħaʔ qow? iqaat, kija i matas~ɕ nħaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們在唱歌嗎？不是，他們在讀書。

S.FORM: kiya i qumuwalax quw? uwal ga, kiya i qumuwalax.
S.PHON: kija i qumuwalax quw? uwal ɣa, kija i qumuwalax.
S.FORM: kiya i qomowalax qow? owal ga, kiya i qomowalax.
S.PHON: kija i qomowalax qow? owal ɣa, kija i qomowalax.
S.TRANSL: 在下雨嗎？是/對，正在下雨。

S.FORM: kiya i qumuwalax quw? ini', makahtuw a wagi' la.
S.PHON: kija i qumuwalax quw? iniʔ, makaħtuw a waɣiʔ la.
S.FORM: kiya i qomowalax qow? ini', makahtow a wagi' la.
S.PHON: kija i qomowalax qow? iniʔ, makaħtow a waɣiʔ la.
S.TRANSL: 在下雨嗎？不，太陽出來了！

S.FORM: mamati' cimuw musa' i mitaal yutas quw? uwal ga, mamati' camiy musa' i mitaal yutas.
S.PHON: mamatiʔ ʦ~ʨimuw mus~ɕaʔ i mitaal jutas~ɕ quw? uwal ɣa, mamatiʔ ʦ~ʨamij mus~ɕaʔ i mitaal jutas~ɕ.
S.FORM: mamati' cimow mosa' i mitaal yotas qow? owal ga, mamati' camiy mosa' i mitaal yotas.
S.PHON: mamatiʔ ʦ~ʨimow mos~ɕaʔ i mitaal jotas~ɕ qow? owal ɣa, mamatiʔ ʦ~ʨamij mos~ɕaʔ i mitaal jotas~ɕ.
S.TRANSL: 你們常常去探望祖父嗎？對，我們常常去探望祖父。

S.FORM: baaq su' i mabahoq cu siyatu' quw? uwal ga, baaq kuwing i mabahoq cu siyatu'.
S.PHON: βaaq s~ɕuʔ i maβaħoq ʦ~ʨu s~ɕijatuʔ quw? uwal ɣa, βaaq kuwiŋ i maβaħoq ʦ~ʨu s~ɕijatuʔ.
S.FORM: baaq so' i mabahoq co siyato' qow? owal ga, baaq kowing i mabahoq co siyato'.
S.PHON: βaaq s~ɕoʔ i maβaħoq ʦ~ʨo s~ɕijatoʔ qow? owal ɣa, βaaq kowiŋ i maβaħoq ʦ~ʨo s~ɕijatoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 你會洗衣服嗎？會，我會洗衣服。

S.FORM: baaq maquwas ku ululaqi' haca quw? uwal ga, baaq cubalay i maquwas nha'.
S.PHON: βaaq maquwas~ɕ ku ululaqiʔ ħaʦ~ʨa quw? uwal ɣa, βaaq ʦ~ʨuβalaj i maquwas~ɕ nħaʔ.
S.FORM: baaq maqowas ko ololaqi' haca qow? owal ga, baaq cobalay i maqowas nha'.
S.PHON: βaaq maqowas~ɕ ko ololaqiʔ ħaʦ~ʨa qow? owal ɣa, βaaq ʦ~ʨoβalaj i maqowas~ɕ nħaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 那些孩子會唱歌嗎？是，他們很會唱歌。

S.FORM: balayq su' ku matas quw? uwal ga, balayq mu ku matas.
S.PHON: βalajq s~ɕuʔ ku matas~ɕ quw? uwal ɣa, βalajq mu ku matas~ɕ.
S.FORM: balayq so' ko matas qow? owal ga, balayq mo ko matas.
S.PHON: βalajq s~ɕoʔ ko matas~ɕ qow? owal ɣa, βalajq mo ko matas~ɕ.
S.TRANSL: 你喜歡讀書嗎？是/對，我喜歡讀書。

S.FORM: balayq nku ulaqi' haca ku matas cu ruwas quw? uwal ga, balayq niya' ku matas cu ruwas.
S.PHON: βalajq nku ulaqiʔ ħaʦ~ʨa ku matas~ɕ ʦ~ʨu ruwas~ɕ quw? uwal ɣa, βalajq nijaʔ ku matas~ɕ ʦ~ʨu ruwas~ɕ.
S.FORM: balayq nko olaqi' haca ko matas co rowas qow? owal ga, balayq niya' ko matas co rowas.
S.PHON: βalajq nko olaqiʔ ħaʦ~ʨa ko matas~ɕ ʦ~ʨo rowas~ɕ qow? owal ɣa, βalajq nijaʔ ko matas~ɕ ʦ~ʨo rowas~ɕ.
S.TRANSL: 那個孩子喜歡畫圖嗎？是/對，他很喜歡畫圖。

S.FORM: balayq na ululaqi' ku maquwas quw? uwal ga, balayq nha' ku maquwas.
S.PHON: βalajq na ululaqiʔ ku maquwas~ɕ quw? uwal ɣa, βalajq nħaʔ ku maquwas~ɕ.
S.FORM: balayq na ololaqi' ko maqowas qow? owal ga, balayq nha' ko maqowas.
S.PHON: βalajq na ololaqiʔ ko maqowas~ɕ qow? owal ɣa, βalajq nħaʔ ko maqowas~ɕ.
S.TRANSL: 那些孩子喜歡唱歌嗎？是，他們喜歡唱歌。

S.FORM: balayq na ululaqi' ku yugi' quw? iqaat, balayq nha' ku mitaal cu tiyens'.
S.PHON: βalajq na ululaqiʔ ku juɣiʔ quw? iqaat, βalajq nħaʔ ku mitaal ʦ~ʨu tijens~ɕʔ.
S.FORM: balayq na ololaqi' ko yogi' qow? iqaat, balayq nha' ko mitaal co tiyens'.
S.PHON: βalajq na ololaqiʔ ko joɣiʔ qow? iqaat, βalajq nħaʔ ko mitaal ʦ~ʨo tijens~ɕʔ.
S.TRANSL: 那些孩子喜歡跳舞嗎？不，他們喜歡看電視。

S.FORM: balayq na ululaqi' ku maganawu' quw? qaat, balayq nha' ku maneq.
S.PHON: βalajq na ululaqiʔ ku maɣanawuʔ quw? qaat, βalajq nħaʔ ku maneq.
S.FORM: balayq na ololaqi' ko maganawo' qow? qaat, balayq nha' ko maneq.
S.PHON: βalajq na ololaqiʔ ko maɣanawoʔ qow? qaat, βalajq nħaʔ ko maneq.
S.TRANSL: 那些孩子喜歡玩耍嗎？不，他們喜歡吃東西。

S.FORM: bunga' ku haca quw? uwal ga, bunga' ku haca.
S.PHON: βuŋaʔ ku ħaʦ~ʨa quw? uwal ɣa, βuŋaʔ ku ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.FORM: bonga' ko haca qow? owal ga, bonga' ko haca.
S.PHON: βoŋaʔ ko ħaʦ~ʨa qow? owal ɣa, βoŋaʔ ko ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.TRANSL: 那是地瓜嗎？是/對，那是地瓜。

S.FORM: guqiloh ku haca quw? iqaat, qatiyay ku haca.
S.PHON: ɣuqiloħ ku ħaʦ~ʨa quw? iqaat, qatijaj ku ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.FORM: goqiloh ko haca qow? iqaat, qatiyay ko haca.
S.PHON: ɣoqiloħ ko ħaʦ~ʨa qow? iqaat, qatijaj ko ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.TRANSL: 那是香蕉嗎？不，那是玉米。

S.FORM: matas su' na' quw? uwal ga, matas kuwing na'.
S.PHON: matas~ɕ s~ɕuʔ naʔ quw? uwal ɣa, matas~ɕ kuwiŋ naʔ.
S.FORM: matas so' na' qow? owal ga, matas kowing na'.
S.PHON: matas~ɕ s~ɕoʔ naʔ qow? owal ɣa, matas~ɕ kowiŋ naʔ.
S.TRANSL: 你是學生嗎？是/對，我是學生。

S.FORM: sinsi' i hiya' quw? iqaat, sinsang i hiya'.
S.PHON: s~ɕins~ɕiʔ i ħijaʔ quw? iqaat, s~ɕins~ɕaŋ i ħijaʔ.
S.FORM: sinsi' i hiya' qow? iqaat, sinsang i hiya'.
S.PHON: s~ɕins~ɕiʔ i ħijaʔ qow? iqaat, s~ɕins~ɕaŋ i ħijaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他是老師嗎？不，他是醫生。

S.FORM: sinsi' su' i hiya' quw? uwal ga, sinsi' mu i hiya'.
S.PHON: s~ɕins~ɕiʔ s~ɕuʔ i ħijaʔ quw? uwal ɣa, s~ɕins~ɕiʔ mu i ħijaʔ.
S.FORM: sinsi' so' i hiya' qow? owal ga, sinsi' mo i hiya'.
S.PHON: s~ɕins~ɕiʔ s~ɕoʔ i ħijaʔ qow? owal ɣa, s~ɕins~ɕiʔ mo i ħijaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他是你的老師嗎？是/對，他是我的老師。

S.FORM: sinsi' su' i hiya' quw? iqaat, hiya' ga yaya' muw.
S.PHON: s~ɕins~ɕiʔ s~ɕuʔ i ħijaʔ quw? iqaat, ħijaʔ ɣa jajaʔ muw.
S.FORM: sinsi' so' i hiya' qow? iqaat, hiya' ga yaya' mow.
S.PHON: s~ɕins~ɕiʔ s~ɕoʔ i ħijaʔ qow? iqaat, ħijaʔ ɣa jajaʔ mow.
S.TRANSL: 她是你的老師嗎？不，她是我的媽媽。

S.FORM: magalawa' ku ngiyaw su' quw? ? uwal ga, magalawa' ku ngiyaw muw.
S.PHON: maɣalawaʔ ku ŋijaw s~ɕuʔ quw? ? uwal ɣa, maɣalawaʔ ku ŋijaw muw.
S.FORM: magalawa' ko ngiyaw so' qow? ? owal ga, magalawa' ko ngiyaw mow.
S.PHON: maɣalawaʔ ko ŋijaw s~ɕoʔ qow? ? owal ɣa, maɣalawaʔ ko ŋijaw mow.
S.TRANSL: 你的貓是黑色的嗎？是/對，我的貓是黑色的。

S.FORM: matanah ku siyatu' niya' quw? iqaat, ma'uba' ku siyatu' niya'.
S.PHON: matanaħ ku s~ɕijatuʔ nijaʔ quw? iqaat, maʔuβaʔ ku s~ɕijatuʔ nijaʔ.
S.FORM: matanah ko siyato' niya' qow? iqaat, ma'oba' ko siyato' niya'.
S.PHON: matanaħ ko s~ɕijatoʔ nijaʔ qow? iqaat, maʔoβaʔ ko s~ɕijatoʔ nijaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 她的衣服是紅色的嗎？不，她的衣服是白色的。

S.FORM: imuleq ku raralan hani quw? uwal ga, imuleq ku raralan haniy.
S.PHON: imuleq ku raralan ħani quw? uwal ɣa, imuleq ku raralan ħanij.
S.FORM: imoleq ko raralan hani qow? owal ga, imoleq ko raralan haniy.
S.PHON: imoleq ko raralan ħani qow? owal ɣa, imoleq ko raralan ħanij.
S.TRANSL: 這張桌子很重嗎？是/對，這張桌子很重。

S.FORM: imuleq ku tahunakan haca quw? ini', lihika' ku tahunakan haca.
S.PHON: imuleq ku taħunakan ħaʦ~ʨa quw? iniʔ, liħikaʔ ku taħunakan ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.FORM: imoleq ko tahonakan haca qow? ini', lihika' ko tahonakan haca.
S.PHON: imoleq ko taħonakan ħaʦ~ʨa qow? iniʔ, liħikaʔ ko taħonakan ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.TRANSL: 那張椅子很重嗎？不，那張椅子很輕。

S.FORM: babaweq i yaba' su' quw? uwal ga, babaweq i yaba' muw.
S.PHON: βaβaweq i jaβaʔ s~ɕuʔ quw? uwal ɣa, βaβaweq i jaβaʔ muw.
S.FORM: babaweq i yaba' so' qow? owal ga, babaweq i yaba' mow.
S.PHON: βaβaweq i jaβaʔ s~ɕoʔ qow? owal ɣa, βaβaweq i jaβaʔ mow.
S.TRANSL: 你爸爸很高嗎？是/對，我爸爸很高。

S.FORM: babaweq i yaya' su' quw? ini', irarawq i yaya' muw.
S.PHON: βaβaweq i jajaʔ s~ɕuʔ quw? iniʔ, irarawq i jajaʔ muw.
S.FORM: babaweq i yaya' so' qow? ini', irarawq i yaya' mow.
S.PHON: βaβaweq i jajaʔ s~ɕoʔ qow? iniʔ, irarawq i jajaʔ mow.
S.TRANSL: 你媽媽很高嗎？不，我媽媽很矮。

S.FORM: qanarux ku abag na tunux niya' quw? uwal ga, qanarux ku abag na tunux niya'.
S.PHON: qanarux ku aβaɣ na tunux nijaʔ quw? uwal ɣa, qanarux ku aβaɣ na tunux nijaʔ.
S.FORM: qanarox ko abag na tonox niya' qow? owal ga, qanarox ko abag na tonox niya'.
S.PHON: qanarox ko aβaɣ na tonox nijaʔ qow? owal ɣa, qanarox ko aβaɣ na tonox nijaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 她的頭髮很長嗎？是/對，她的頭髮很長。

S.FORM: qanarux ku abag na tunux su' quw? ini', isiting ku abag na tunux muw.
S.PHON: qanarux ku aβaɣ na tunux s~ɕuʔ quw? iniʔ, is~ɕitiŋ ku aβaɣ na tunux muw.
S.FORM: qanarox ko abag na tonox so' qow? ini', isiting ko abag na tonox mow.
S.PHON: qanarox ko aβaɣ na tonox s~ɕoʔ qow? iniʔ, is~ɕitiŋ ko aβaɣ na tonox mow.
S.TRANSL: 你的頭髮很長嗎？不，我的頭髮很短。

S.FORM: makarux ku suquleq haca quw? uwal ga, makarux ku suquleq haca.
S.PHON: makarux ku s~ɕuquleq ħaʦ~ʨa quw? uwal ɣa, makarux ku s~ɕuquleq ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.FORM: makarox ko soqoleq haca qow? owal ga, makarox ko soqoleq haca.
S.PHON: makarox ko s~ɕoqoleq ħaʦ~ʨa qow? owal ɣa, makarox ko s~ɕoqoleq ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.TRANSL: 那個人很勤勞嗎？是/對，他很勤勞。

S.FORM: makarux ku suquleq haca quw? ini', masapeq ku suquleq haca.
S.PHON: makarux ku s~ɕuquleq ħaʦ~ʨa quw? iniʔ, mas~ɕapeq ku s~ɕuquleq ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.FORM: makarox ko soqoleq haca qow? ini', masapeq ko soqoleq haca.
S.PHON: makarox ko s~ɕoqoleq ħaʦ~ʨa qow? iniʔ, mas~ɕapeq ko s~ɕoqoleq ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.TRANSL: 那個人很勤勞嗎？不，他很懶惰。

S.FORM: kiya a ulaqi' niya' quw? uwal ga, kiya a ulaqi' niya'.
S.PHON: kija a ulaqiʔ nijaʔ quw? uwal ɣa, kija a ulaqiʔ nijaʔ.
S.FORM: kiya a olaqi' niya' qow? owal ga, kiya a olaqi' niya'.
S.PHON: kija a olaqiʔ nijaʔ qow? owal ɣa, kija a olaqiʔ nijaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他有孩子嗎？是/對，他有孩子。

S.FORM: kiya xuwil su' quw? uwal ga, qutux ku xuwil muw.
S.PHON: kija xuwil s~ɕuʔ quw? uwal ɣa, qutux ku xuwil muw.
S.FORM: kiya xowil so' qow? owal ga, qotox ko xowil mow.
S.PHON: kija xowil s~ɕoʔ qow? owal ɣa, qotox ko xowil mow.
S.TRANSL: 你有狗嗎？是/對，我有一隻狗。

S.FORM: caxa' ku suwayi' su' na kanayril quw? uwal ga, caxa' ku suwayi' mu na kanayril.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨaxaʔ ku s~ɕuwajiʔ s~ɕuʔ na kanajril quw? uwal ɣa, ʦ~ʨaxaʔ ku s~ɕuwajiʔ mu na kanajril.
S.FORM: caxa' ko sowayi' so' na kanayril qow? owal ga, caxa' ko sowayi' mo na kanayril.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨaxaʔ ko s~ɕowajiʔ s~ɕoʔ na kanajril qow? owal ɣa, ʦ~ʨaxaʔ ko s~ɕowajiʔ mo na kanajril.
S.TRANSL: 你有一個妹妹嗎？是/對，我有一個妹妹。

S.FORM: caxa' ku suwayi' su' na kanayril quw? iqaat, rarusa' ku suwayi' mu na kanayril.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨaxaʔ ku s~ɕuwajiʔ s~ɕuʔ na kanajril quw? iqaat, rarus~ɕaʔ ku s~ɕuwajiʔ mu na kanajril.
S.FORM: caxa' ko sowayi' so' na kanayril qow? iqaat, rarosa' ko sowayi' mo na kanayril.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨaxaʔ ko s~ɕowajiʔ s~ɕoʔ na kanajril qow? iqaat, raros~ɕaʔ ko s~ɕowajiʔ mo na kanajril.
S.TRANSL: 你有一個妹妹嗎？不，我有二個妹妹。

S.FORM: balaiq talan ku hakri' na utux quw? uwal ga, balaiq cubalay i talan ku hakri' na utux.
S.PHON: βalaiq talan ku ħakriʔ na utux quw? uwal ɣa, βalaiq ʦ~ʨuβalaj i talan ku ħakriʔ na utux.
S.FORM: balaiq talan ko hakri' na otox qow? owal ga, balaiq cobalay i talan ko hakri' na otox.
S.PHON: βalaiq talan ko ħakriʔ na otox qow? owal ɣa, βalaiq ʦ~ʨoβalaj i talan ko ħakriʔ na otox.
S.TRANSL: 彩虹好看嗎？是/對，彩虹非常好看。

S.FORM: rahuwal ku imuwag haca quw? uwal ga, rahuwal ku imuwag haca.
S.PHON: raħuwal ku imuwaɣ ħaʦ~ʨa quw? uwal ɣa, raħuwal ku imuwaɣ ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.FORM: rahowal ko imowag haca qow? owal ga, rahowal ko imowag haca.
S.PHON: raħowal ko imowaɣ ħaʦ~ʨa qow? owal ɣa, raħowal ko imowaɣ ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.TRANSL: 那間房子很大嗎？是/對，那間房子很大。

S.FORM: rahuwal ku imuwag haca quw? ini', tikay ku imuwag haca.
S.PHON: raħuwal ku imuwaɣ ħaʦ~ʨa quw? iniʔ, tikaj ku imuwaɣ ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.FORM: rahowal ko imowag haca qow? ini', tikay ko imowag haca.
S.PHON: raħowal ko imowaɣ ħaʦ~ʨa qow? iniʔ, tikaj ko imowaɣ ħaʦ~ʨa.
S.TRANSL: 那間房子很大嗎？不，那間房子很小。

S.FORM: balaiq a kaal sawni' quw? uwal ga, balaiq a kaal sawni'.
S.PHON: βalaiq a kaal s~ɕawniʔ quw? uwal ɣa, βalaiq a kaal s~ɕawniʔ.
S.FORM: balaiq a kaal sawni' qow? owal ga, balaiq a kaal sawni'.
S.PHON: βalaiq a kaal s~ɕawniʔ qow? owal ɣa, βalaiq a kaal s~ɕawniʔ.
S.TRANSL: 今天天氣好嗎？是/對，今天天氣很好。

S.FORM: balaiq a kaal sawni' quw? ini' kabalaiq ku kaal, haniyan i qumuwalax.
S.PHON: βalaiq a kaal s~ɕawniʔ quw? iniʔ kaβalaiq ku kaal, ħanijan i qumuwalax.
S.FORM: balaiq a kaal sawni' qow? ini' kabalaiq ko kaal, haniyan i qomowalax.
S.PHON: βalaiq a kaal s~ɕawniʔ qow? iniʔ kaβalaiq ko kaal, ħanijan i qomowalax.
S.TRANSL: 今天天氣好嗎？不，正在下雨。

S.FORM: makilux sawni' quw? uwal ga, makilux sawni'.
S.PHON: makilux s~ɕawniʔ quw? uwal ɣa, makilux s~ɕawniʔ.
S.FORM: makilox sawni' qow? owal ga, makilox sawni'.
S.PHON: makilox s~ɕawniʔ qow? owal ɣa, makilox s~ɕawniʔ.
S.TRANSL: 今天熱嗎？是/對，今天很熱。

S.FORM: makilux sawni' quw? ini', tala'tu' sawni'.
S.PHON: makilux s~ɕawniʔ quw? iniʔ, talaʔtuʔ s~ɕawniʔ.
S.FORM: makilox sawni' qow? ini', tala'to' sawni'.
S.PHON: makilox s~ɕawniʔ qow? iniʔ, talaʔtoʔ s~ɕawniʔ.

S.FORM: samsum la quw? uwal ga, mubaq a wagi' la.
S.PHON: s~ɕams~ɕum la quw? uwal ɣa, muβaq a waɣiʔ la.
S.FORM: samsom la qow? owal ga, mobaq a wagi' la.
S.PHON: s~ɕams~ɕom la qow? owal ɣa, moβaq a waɣiʔ la.
S.TRANSL: 天黑了嗎？是/對，太陽下山了！

S.FORM: muwah ku bayhu ka mamati' la quw? uwal ga, mamati' a quwalax cu sawni'.
S.PHON: muwaħ ku βajħu ka mamatiʔ la quw? uwal ɣa, mamatiʔ a quwalax ʦ~ʨu s~ɕawniʔ.
S.FORM: mowah ko bayho ka mamati' la qow? owal ga, mamati' a qowalax co sawni'.
S.PHON: mowaħ ko βajħo ka mamatiʔ la qow? owal ɣa, mamatiʔ a qowalax ʦ~ʨo s~ɕawniʔ.
S.TRANSL: 颱風來了嗎？是/對，今天下雨下得很大。

S.FORM: mitaal cu tieyns' karariax i nha' quw? uwal ga, mitaal cu tieyns' karariax nha'.
S.PHON: mitaal ʦ~ʨu tiejns~ɕʔ karariax i nħaʔ quw? uwal ɣa, mitaal ʦ~ʨu tiejns~ɕʔ karariax nħaʔ.
S.FORM: mitaal co tieyns' karariax i nha' qow? owal ga, mitaal co tieyns' karariax nha'.
S.PHON: mitaal ʦ~ʨo tiejns~ɕʔ karariax i nħaʔ qow? owal ɣa, mitaal ʦ~ʨo tiejns~ɕʔ karariax nħaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們天天看電視嗎？是/對，他們天天看電視。

S.FORM: mitaal su' cu tieyns' karariax quw? ini', matas kuwing cu ruwas karariax.
S.PHON: mitaal s~ɕuʔ ʦ~ʨu tiejns~ɕʔ karariax quw? iniʔ, matas~ɕ kuwiŋ ʦ~ʨu ruwas~ɕ karariax.
S.FORM: mitaal so' co tieyns' karariax qow? ini', matas kowing co rowas karariax.
S.PHON: mitaal s~ɕoʔ ʦ~ʨo tiejns~ɕʔ karariax qow? iniʔ, matas~ɕ kowiŋ ʦ~ʨo rowas~ɕ karariax.
S.TRANSL: 你天天看電視嗎？不，我天天讀書。

S.FORM: maqabubing karariax i hiya' quw? uwal ga, maqabubing karariax hiya'.
S.PHON: maqaβuβiŋ karariax i ħijaʔ quw? uwal ɣa, maqaβuβiŋ karariax ħijaʔ.
S.FORM: maqabobing karariax i hiya' qow? owal ga, maqabobing karariax hiya'.
S.PHON: maqaβoβiŋ karariax i ħijaʔ qow? owal ɣa, maqaβoβiŋ karariax ħijaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 她常常戴帽子嗎？是/對，她常常戴帽子。

S.FORM: kiya i maqilaap ku suwayi' su' quw? uwal ga, kiya i maqilaap hiya'.
S.PHON: kija i maqilaap ku s~ɕuwajiʔ s~ɕuʔ quw? uwal ɣa, kija i maqilaap ħijaʔ.
S.FORM: kiya i maqilaap ko sowayi' so' qow? owal ga, kiya i maqilaap hiya'.
S.PHON: kija i maqilaap ko s~ɕowajiʔ s~ɕoʔ qow? owal ɣa, kija i maqilaap ħijaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 你妹妹在睡覺嗎？是/對，她在睡覺。

S.FORM: kiya i maganaw ku ululaqi' quw? uwal ga, kiya i maganaw ku ululaqi'.
S.PHON: kija i maɣanaw ku ululaqiʔ quw? uwal ɣa, kija i maɣanaw ku ululaqiʔ.
S.FORM: kiya i maganaw ko ololaqi' qow? owal ga, kiya i maganaw ko ololaqi'.
S.PHON: kija i maɣanaw ko ololaqiʔ qow? owal ɣa, kija i maɣanaw ko ololaqiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 那些孩子在玩耍嗎？是/對，那些孩子在玩耍。

S.FORM: qumuwalax la, maras su' cu tabakuy quw? uwal ga, maras kuwing cu tabakuy.
S.PHON: qumuwalax la, maras~ɕ s~ɕuʔ ʦ~ʨu taβakuj quw? uwal ɣa, maras~ɕ kuwiŋ ʦ~ʨu taβakuj.
S.FORM: qomowalax la, maras so' co tabakoy qow? owal ga, maras kowing co tabakoy.
S.PHON: qomowalax la, maras~ɕ s~ɕoʔ ʦ~ʨo taβakoj qow? owal ɣa, maras~ɕ kowiŋ ʦ~ʨo taβakoj.
S.TRANSL: 下雨了！你帶著雨傘嗎？是/對，我帶著雨傘。

S.FORM: kiya i qumuwalax quw? uwal ga, kiya i qumuwalax.
S.PHON: kija i qumuwalax quw? uwal ɣa, kija i qumuwalax.
S.FORM: kiya i qomowalax qow? owal ga, kiya i qomowalax.
S.PHON: kija i qomowalax qow? owal ɣa, kija i qomowalax.
S.TRANSL: 在下雨嗎？是/對，正在下雨。

S.FORM: kiya i qumuwalax quw? ini', makahtuw a wagi' la.
S.PHON: kija i qumuwalax quw? iniʔ, makaħtuw a waɣiʔ la.
S.FORM: kiya i qomowalax qow? ini', makahtow a wagi' la.
S.PHON: kija i qomowalax qow? iniʔ, makaħtow a waɣiʔ la.
S.TRANSL: 在下雨嗎？不，太陽出來了！

S.FORM: mamati' cimuw musa' mitaal i yutas quw? uwal ga, mamati' camiy musa' mitaal i yutas
S.PHON: mamatiʔ ʦ~ʨimuw mus~ɕaʔ mitaal i jutas~ɕ quw? uwal ɣa, mamatiʔ ʦ~ʨamij mus~ɕaʔ mitaal i jutas~ɕ
S.FORM: mamati' cimow mosa' mitaal i yotas qow? owal ga, mamati' camiy mosa' mitaal i yotas
S.PHON: mamatiʔ ʦ~ʨimow mos~ɕaʔ mitaal i jotas~ɕ qow? owal ɣa, mamatiʔ ʦ~ʨamij mos~ɕaʔ mitaal i jotas~ɕ
S.TRANSL: 你們常常去探望祖父嗎？是/對，我們常常去探望祖父。

S.FORM: muwah cimuw kumgabiyan runi karariax quw? uwal ga, muwah camiy kumgabiyan runi karariax.
S.PHON: muwaħ ʦ~ʨimuw kumɣaβijan runi karariax quw? uwal ɣa, muwaħ ʦ~ʨamij kumɣaβijan runi karariax.
S.FORM: mowah cimow komgabiyan roni karariax qow? owal ga, mowah camiy komgabiyan roni karariax.
S.PHON: mowaħ ʦ~ʨimow komɣaβijan roni karariax qow? owal ɣa, mowaħ ʦ~ʨamij komɣaβijan roni karariax.
S.TRANSL: 你們天天來這裡吃晚餐嗎？是/對，我們天天來這裡吃晚餐。

S.FORM: balayq nku ulaqi' haca ku matas cu ruwas quw? uwal ga, balayq niya' ku matas cu ruwas.
S.PHON: βalajq nku ulaqiʔ ħaʦ~ʨa ku matas~ɕ ʦ~ʨu ruwas~ɕ quw? uwal ɣa, βalajq nijaʔ ku matas~ɕ ʦ~ʨu ruwas~ɕ.
S.FORM: balayq nko olaqi' haca ko matas co rowas qow? owal ga, balayq niya' ko matas co rowas.
S.PHON: βalajq nko olaqiʔ ħaʦ~ʨa ko matas~ɕ ʦ~ʨo rowas~ɕ qow? owal ɣa, βalajq nijaʔ ko matas~ɕ ʦ~ʨo rowas~ɕ.
S.TRANSL: 那個孩子喜歡畫圖嗎？是/對，他很喜歡畫圖。

S.FORM: balayq su' ku matas quw? uwal ga, balayq mu cubalay ku matas.
S.PHON: βalajq s~ɕuʔ ku matas~ɕ quw? uwal ɣa, βalajq mu ʦ~ʨuβalaj ku matas~ɕ.
S.FORM: balayq so' ko matas qow? owal ga, balayq mo cobalay ko matas.
S.PHON: βalajq s~ɕoʔ ko matas~ɕ qow? owal ɣa, βalajq mo ʦ~ʨoβalaj ko matas~ɕ.
S.TRANSL: 你喜歡讀書嗎？是/對，我很喜歡讀書。

S.FORM: baq maquwas ku ululaqi' haca quw? uwal ga, baq cubalay maquwas i nha'.
S.PHON: βaq maquwas~ɕ ku ululaqiʔ ħaʦ~ʨa quw? uwal ɣa, βaq ʦ~ʨuβalaj maquwas~ɕ i nħaʔ.
S.FORM: baq maqowas ko ololaqi' haca qow? owal ga, baq cobalay maqowas i nha'.
S.PHON: βaq maqowas~ɕ ko ololaqiʔ ħaʦ~ʨa qow? owal ɣa, βaq ʦ~ʨoβalaj maqowas~ɕ i nħaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 那些孩子會唱歌嗎？會/對，他們很會唱歌。

S.FORM: baaq su' i mabahoq cu siyatu' quw? uwal ga, baaq kuwing i mabahoq cu siyatu'.
S.PHON: βaaq s~ɕuʔ i maβaħoq ʦ~ʨu s~ɕijatuʔ quw? uwal ɣa, βaaq kuwiŋ i maβaħoq ʦ~ʨu s~ɕijatuʔ.
S.FORM: baaq so' i mabahoq co siyato' qow? owal ga, baaq kowing i mabahoq co siyato'.
S.PHON: βaaq s~ɕoʔ i maβaħoq ʦ~ʨo s~ɕijatoʔ qow? owal ɣa, βaaq kowiŋ i maβaħoq ʦ~ʨo s~ɕijatoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 你會洗衣服嗎？會/對，我會洗衣服。

S.FORM: yani na' a mausa' mamu maganawu' i papatiqan quw? uwal ga, yani na' a mausa' niyam maganawu' i papatiqan.
S.PHON: jani naʔ a maus~ɕaʔ mamu maɣanawuʔ i papatiqan quw? uwal ɣa, jani naʔ a maus~ɕaʔ nijam maɣanawuʔ i papatiqan.
S.FORM: yani na' a maosa' mamo maganawo' i papatiqan qow? owal ga, yani na' a maosa' niyam maganawo' i papatiqan.
S.PHON: jani naʔ a maos~ɕaʔ mamo maɣanawoʔ i papatiqan qow? owal ɣa, jani naʔ a maos~ɕaʔ nijam maɣanawoʔ i papatiqan.
S.TRANSL: 你們正要去學校玩耍嗎？是/對，我們正要去學校玩耍。

S.FORM: pakabalaiq musa' kuwing maganawu' i babaw na kinriaxan quw? uwal, usa' maganawu' ga.
S.PHON: pakaβalaiq mus~ɕaʔ kuwiŋ maɣanawuʔ i βaβaw na kinriaxan quw? uwal, us~ɕaʔ maɣanawuʔ ɣa.
S.FORM: pakabalaiq mosa' kowing maganawo' i babaw na kinriaxan qow? owal, osa' maganawo' ga.
S.PHON: pakaβalaiq mos~ɕaʔ kowiŋ maɣanawoʔ i βaβaw na kinriaxan qow? owal, os~ɕaʔ maɣanawoʔ ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 下午我可以出去玩嗎？ (請求同意)好，你可以出去玩！
起立！敬禮！(班長說)老師好！(全班說)
同學好 (老師說)坐下！ (班長說)

S.FORM: gawahani cami han, aki'!uwal, uniyal kuwing la!
S.PHON: ɣawaħani ʦ~ʨami ħan, akiʔ!uwal, unijal kuwiŋ la!
S.FORM: gawahani cami han, aki'!owal, oniyal kowing la!
S.PHON: ɣawaħani ʦ~ʨami ħan, akiʔ!owal, onijal kowiŋ la!
S.TRANSL: 祖母，請開門！(較客氣之說法)好！來了！

S.FORM: ima' ralu' nku qumisuwan niya' na kanayril?
S.PHON: imaʔ raluʔ nku qumis~ɕuwan nijaʔ na kanajril?

S.PHON: imaʔ raloʔ nko qomis~ɕowan nijaʔ na kanajril?

S.PHON: pijaʔ ku βuŋaʔ nku ulaqiʔ ħanij?
S.FORM: piya' ko bonga' nko olaqi' haniy?
S.PHON: pijaʔ ko βoŋaʔ nko olaqiʔ ħanij?

S.FORM: piya' ku iyuk nku ulaqi' haniy?
S.PHON: pijaʔ ku ijuk nku ulaqiʔ ħanij?
S.FORM: piya' ko iyok nko olaqi' haniy?
S.PHON: pijaʔ ko ijok nko olaqiʔ ħanij?

S.FORM: piya' ku guqiloh nku ulaqi' haniy?

S.FORM: piya' ko goqiloh nko olaqi' haniy?
S.PHON: pijaʔ ko ɣoqiloħ nko olaqiʔ ħanij?

S.FORM: piya' kaal ni qumisuwan su' na mamalikuw?

S.FORM: piya' kaal ni qomisowan so' na mamalikow?
S.PHON: pijaʔ kaal ni qomis~ɕowan s~ɕoʔ na mamalikow?

S.FORM: piya' kaal ni suwayi' su' na kanayril?
S.PHON: pijaʔ kaal ni s~ɕuwajiʔ s~ɕuʔ na kanajril?
S.FORM: piya' kaal ni sowayi' so' na kanayril?

S.FORM: uniyal ku bayhu ka mamati' la!
S.PHON: unijal ku βajħu ka mamatiʔ la!
S.FORM: oniyal ko bayho ka mamati' la!
S.PHON: onijal ko βajħo ka mamatiʔ la!

S.FORM: mamati' uwiy ku bayhu cu sawni'.
S.PHON: mamatiʔ uwij ku βajħu ʦ~ʨu s~ɕawniʔ.

S.PHON: mamatiʔ owij ko βajħo ʦ~ʨo s~ɕawniʔ.

S.FORM: payux a bayhu ka mamati' i gabagan.

S.FORM: payox a bayho ka mamati' i gabagan.
S.PHON: pajox a βajħo ka mamatiʔ i ɣaβaɣan.

S.FORM: yayaik uwiy ku qusiya' i gawng.

S.FORM: yayaik owiy ko qosiya' i gawng.
S.PHON: jajaik owij ko qos~ɕijaʔ i ɣawŋ.

S.FORM: masay ku iyuk i tikay ka qamisan la.

S.FORM: masay ko iyok i tikay ka qamisan la.
S.PHON: mas~ɕaj ko ijok i tikaj ka qamis~ɕan la.

S.FORM: lehpeq ku qusiya' na gawng i qamisan.
S.PHON: leħpeq ku qus~ɕijaʔ na ɣawŋ i qamis~ɕan.
S.FORM: lehpeq ko qosiya' na gawng i qamisan.

S.FORM: mabahoq cu siyatu' karariax i yaki' muw.
S.PHON: maβaħoq ʦ~ʨu s~ɕijatuʔ karariax i jakiʔ muw.

S.FORM: matas cu ruwas karariax i mama' muw.

S.PHON: kija i maqilaap ku qamis~ɕuwan nijaʔ na mamalikuw.
S.FORM: kiya i maqilaap ko qamisowan niya' na mamalikow.

S.PHON: maqaβuβiŋ i qumis~ɕuwan nijaʔ na kanajril.

S.FORM: kiya maneq cu cayi' i suwayi' niya' na mamalikuw.
S.PHON: kija maneq ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨajiʔ i s~ɕuwajiʔ nijaʔ na mamalikuw.
S.FORM: kiya maneq co cayi' i sowayi' niya' na mamalikow.
S.PHON: kija maneq ʦ~ʨo ʦ~ʨajiʔ i s~ɕowajiʔ nijaʔ na mamalikow.

S.FORM: kiya i maquwas ku suwayi' niya' na kanayril.

S.FORM: kiya i maqowas ko sowayi' niya' na kanayril.

S.FORM: kiya i matas ku rawin niya'.
S.PHON: kija i matas~ɕ ku rawin nijaʔ.
S.FORM: kiya i matas ko rawin niya'.
S.PHON: kija i matas~ɕ ko rawin nijaʔ.

S.FORM: haniyan su' i maneq cu cayi' quw?
S.PHON: ħanijan s~ɕuʔ i maneq ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨajiʔ quw?
S.FORM: haniyan so' i maneq co cayi' qow?

S.FORM: ini' kuwing i qaneq cu cayi'.
S.PHON: iniʔ kuwiŋ i qaneq ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨajiʔ.
S.FORM: ini' kowing i qaneq co cayi'.

S.FORM: habag ku rawin mu. kiya a mamalikuw ru kaknayril. maglu cami i matas, maglu cami maganawu' uwiy. balaiq cubalay ku sinsi' niyam. mamati' cami niya' i pasibaqan kumaal cu kayi' na itaal ru maquwas. kisleq niyam i sinsi' ru mahuway cubalay.
S.PHON: ħaβaɣ ku rawin mu. kija a mamalikuw ru kaknajril. maɣlu ʦ~ʨami i matas~ɕ, maɣlu ʦ~ʨami maɣanawuʔ uwij. βalaiq ʦ~ʨuβalaj ku s~ɕins~ɕiʔ nijam. mamatiʔ ʦ~ʨami nijaʔ i pas~ɕiβaqan kumaal ʦ~ʨu kajiʔ na itaal ru maquwas~ɕ. kis~ɕleq nijam i s~ɕins~ɕiʔ ru maħuwaj ʦ~ʨuβalaj.
S.FORM: habag ko rawin mo. kiya a mamalikow ro kaknayril. maglo cami i matas, maglo cami maganawo' owiy. balaiq cobalay ko sinsi' niyam. mamati' cami niya' i pasibaqan komaal co kayi' na itaal ro maqowas. kisleq niyam i sinsi' ro mahoway cobalay.
S.PHON: ħaβaɣ ko rawin mo. kija a mamalikow ro kaknajril. maɣlo ʦ~ʨami i matas~ɕ, maɣlo ʦ~ʨami maɣanawoʔ owij. βalaiq ʦ~ʨoβalaj ko s~ɕins~ɕiʔ nijam. mamatiʔ ʦ~ʨami nijaʔ i pas~ɕiβaqan komaal ʦ~ʨo kajiʔ na itaal ro maqowas~ɕ. kis~ɕleq nijam i s~ɕins~ɕiʔ ro maħowaj ʦ~ʨoβalaj.
S.TRANSL: 我有很多朋友，有男生，也有女生。我們天天一起讀書，也一起玩耍。我們的老師很好，她常常和我們一起說族語，也一起唱歌。我們都非常喜歡她(我們的老師)。

S.FORM: matas kuwing na'. maksawbeh i papatiqan ku imuwag muw. humakay kuwing karariax musa' i papatiqan ru, muwah i imuwag. wehti' ku papatiqan niyam, habag ku glu muw i matas ru', habag ku sinsi' uwiy. maglu cami makibaq matas ru maquwas ki sinsi' niyam. pasibaqan cami i kumaal cu kayi' na Matu'uwal karariax ni nasinsi', mahuway cubalay. kisleq muw cubalay ku papatiqan muw.
S.PHON: matas~ɕ kuwiŋ naʔ. maks~ɕawβeħ i papatiqan ku imuwaɣ muw. ħumakaj kuwiŋ karariax mus~ɕaʔ i papatiqan ru, muwaħ i imuwaɣ. weħtiʔ ku papatiqan nijam, ħaβaɣ ku ɣlu muw i matas~ɕ ruʔ, ħaβaɣ ku s~ɕins~ɕiʔ uwij. maɣlu ʦ~ʨami makiβaq matas~ɕ ru maquwas~ɕ ki s~ɕins~ɕiʔ nijam. pas~ɕiβaqan ʦ~ʨami i kumaal ʦ~ʨu kajiʔ na matuʔuwal karariax ni nas~ɕins~ɕiʔ, maħuwaj ʦ~ʨuβalaj. kis~ɕleq muw ʦ~ʨuβalaj ku papatiqan muw.
S.FORM: matas kowing na'. maksawbeh i papatiqan ko imowag mow. homakay kowing karariax mosa' i papatiqan ro, mowah i imowag. wehti' ko papatiqan niyam, habag ko glo mow i matas ro', habag ko sinsi' owiy. maglo cami makibaq matas ro maqowas ki sinsi' niyam. pasibaqan cami i komaal co kayi' na Mato'owal karariax ni nasinsi', mahoway cobalay. kisleq mow cobalay ko papatiqan mow.
S.PHON: matas~ɕ kowiŋ naʔ. maks~ɕawβeħ i papatiqan ko imowaɣ mow. ħomakaj kowiŋ karariax mos~ɕaʔ i papatiqan ro, mowaħ i imowaɣ. weħtiʔ ko papatiqan nijam, ħaβaɣ ko ɣlo mow i matas~ɕ roʔ, ħaβaɣ ko s~ɕins~ɕiʔ owij. maɣlo ʦ~ʨami makiβaq matas~ɕ ro maqowas~ɕ ki s~ɕins~ɕiʔ nijam. pas~ɕiβaqan ʦ~ʨami i komaal ʦ~ʨo kajiʔ na matoʔowal karariax ni nas~ɕins~ɕiʔ, maħowaj ʦ~ʨoβalaj. kis~ɕleq mow ʦ~ʨoβalaj ko papatiqan mow.
S.TRANSL: 我是學生。我的家在我的學校附近。我天天走路去學校，也走路回家。我們的學校很大，有很多學生，也有很多老師。我們的老師都很好。他們天天和我們一起讀書，也一起唱歌。我們常常說族語。我非常喜歡我的學校。
怎麼(做某事)；如何(做某事)
